title: Design and layout of social network prototypes at Telefónica I+D
description: UI/UX development of social media prototypes in agile environments for Telefónica R&D, using JavaScript and HTML/CSS standards.
body:
At **Telefónica I+D**, the innovation and research lab of the Telefónica group, I participated in the development of interfaces for **social network prototypes**, at a time when social platforms were still an unexplored technological frontier.

## Innovation and Prototyping

The research environment involved working with a high degree of uncertainty and iteration: prototypes evolved rapidly, interfaces were tested with real users, and design decisions were made in an informed but agile way.

## SCRUM Methodology

The project followed **SCRUM** methodology, with short sprints and daily meetings. Learning to work in short delivery cycles in an innovation environment was one of the most formative experiences of this stage.

## Stack and Platform

The technology stack combined **PHP** and **Drupal** for content and user management, with a presentation layer built with **HTML**, **CSS**, and **JavaScript** following the standards of the time.

## Technologies

-   HTML
-   CSS
-   JavaScript
-   SCRUM
-   PHP
-   Drupal
